updates.name: Genspark Claw
updates.description: Genspark's first 'AI Employee' — a cloud-hosted agent that operates its own dedicated computer on your behalf. Delegate tasks via WhatsApp, Slack, or Teams and it executes multi-step workflows independently with full data isolation. No setup or API keys required.

updates.name: Viktor by Zeta Labs
updates.description: An autonomous AI coworker that lives in Slack and Microsoft Teams. It has its own cloud computer, connects to 3,000+ tools (Salesforce, HubSpot, GitHub, Notion), and proactively suggests automations by observing how your team works. Backed by Daniel Gross and Nat Friedman.

updates.name: Helios (ByteDance / Peking University / Canva)
updates.description: The first 14B video model to hit real-time generation — 19.5 FPS on a single H100 GPU for 60-second videos. Supports text-to-video, image-to-video, and video-to-video. Fully open-source under Apache 2.0 with three model variants.

updates.name: LTX 2.3 by Lightricks
updates.description: Open-source 22B-parameter video generation model producing native 4K video at 50 FPS with built-in audio synchronization, portrait 9:16 support, and a desktop video editor for local generation on consumer hardware. Apache 2.0 license.

updates.name: Baidu DuClaw
updates.description: Zero-deployment access to OpenClaw AI agents directly in your browser — no installation, configuration, or API keys. Comes preloaded with Baidu Search, Scholar, and supports DeepSeek, Kimi-K2.5, and GLM-5 models out of the box.

updates.name: DeerFlow 2.0 (ByteDance)
updates.description: Open-source SuperAgent framework that can research, code, and create using sandboxes, persistent memory, tools, skills, and subagents. Handles tasks ranging from minutes to hours, acting as a fully autonomous project worker.

updates.name: DynamicLake Pro
updates.description: Brings iPhone's Dynamic Island to any Mac with interactive notifications, music controls, weather, calendar, and multi-app messaging (iMessage, WhatsApp, Slack, Telegram). New update adds gesture-driven notifications and multi-file DynaDrop conversions.

updates.name: NousResearch Hermes Agent
updates.description: An adaptive AI agent that evolves alongside its user — learning preferences, building context over time, and growing more useful the longer you work with it. Open-source and trending on GitHub.

updates.name: Alibaba Page Agent
updates.description: A JavaScript-based in-page GUI agent that lets you control any web interface using natural language. Paste it into your browser and tell it what to do — it clicks, types, navigates, and extracts data from any website.

updates.name: Apple Siri AI Overhaul (iOS 26.4)
updates.description: Apple's completely reimagined, AI-powered Siri rolling out with iOS 26.4 this month. Powered by Google's 1.2T-parameter Gemini model, the new Siri handles multi-step tasks like ordering groceries, booking restaurants, and managing complex workflows.
